prompts.title1: Human Silhouette in Digital Code Waterfall
prompts.title4: Cyber Samurai Drawing Sword in Rainy Night
prompts.item1:
Model: Veo 3.1 Fast
Duration: 6 seconds
Resolution: 720 × 1280 (9:16 portrait)

Scene: Human silhouette in digital code waterfall

First frame/cover requirements:
- Green code streams cascading from the top
- Clear human outline in the center, high-tech aesthetic

Timeline:
- 0-1s: Dense green code rain pouring from above
- 1-3s: A human silhouette gradually emerges in the code stream, code flowing around it
- 3-5s: The figure opens its eyes (emitting blue glow), reaches out to touch the code
- 5-6s: Light bursts where the code is touched, spreading outward, fading out

Effects: Matrix code rain, holographic scan lines, data particles, ray-traced reflections
Background: Pure black space, only code glow
Style: Matrix aesthetic, black-green color scheme, high-tech texture
Camera: Fixed front view, slight push-in
prompts.item2:
Model: Veo 3.1 Fast
Duration: 6 seconds
Resolution: 720 × 1280 (9:16 portrait)

Scene: Flame phoenix rising from ashes

First frame/cover requirements:
- Phoenix silhouette centered, surrounded by flame particles
- Dark background contrasting the firelight, strong visual impact

Timeline:
- 0-1s: Ashes accumulate in darkness, faint embers flickering
- 1-3s: Flames suddenly erupt, phoenix outline gradually taking shape
- 3-5s: Phoenix fully spreads its wings, flame feathers scatter, particles splash
- 5-6s: Phoenix takes flight, flame trail behind, camera moves up and fades out

Effects: Flame particles, falling embers, heat wave distorting air, dynamic lighting
Background: Pure black abyss, illuminated only by firelight
Style: Epic CG, orange-red-gold tones, cinematic lighting
Camera: Low angle looking up, slow upward pan following
prompts.item3:
Model: Veo 3.1 Fast
Duration: 6 seconds
Resolution: 1280 × 720 (16:9 landscape)

Scene: Spaceship traversing interstellar wormhole

First frame/cover requirements:
- Ship centered, surrounded by wormhole ring
- Spectacular starfield background, stunning composition

Timeline:
- 0-1s: Ship hovers before the massive wormhole entrance, energy vortex rotating
- 1-3s: Ship engines ignite, plunging into the wormhole, space-time begins to warp
- 3-5s: During traversal, colorful light streaks rush past, nebulae stretch and deform
- 5-6s: Ship emerges from the other end, facing a new galaxy, fade out

Effects: Energy vortex, light-speed stretch effect, space-time distortion, engine trails, nebula particles
Background: Deep space nebula, distant galaxies, wormhole energy ring
Style: Interstellar/Star Wars aesthetic, grand epic feel, HDR high dynamic range
Camera: Following the ship, from stationary to high-speed acceleration
prompts.item4:
Model: Veo 3.1 Fast
Duration: 6 seconds
Resolution: 1280 × 720 (16:9 landscape)

Scene: Cyber samurai drawing sword in rainy night

First frame/cover requirements:
- Samurai standing sideways, hand on sword hilt
- Neon lights reflecting on armor, raindrops frozen in air

Timeline:
- 0-1s: Rainy street at night, samurai stands with back to camera, neon lights flickering
- 1-2s: Samurai suddenly turns, hand gripping hilt (slow motion)
- 2-4s: Sword drawn from sheath, blade light cuts through rain curtain, slicing raindrops (super slow motion)
- 4-5s: Sword returns to sheath, raindrops resume falling
- 5-6s: Samurai turns and walks away, disappearing into the rain mist, fade out

Effects: Blade light trail, details of sliced raindrops, slow-motion rain, neon reflections, steam mist
Background: Cyberpunk Japanese street, neon signs, wet ground reflections
Style: Devil May Cry/Cyberpunk samurai aesthetic, cyan-purple neon colors, cinematic slow motion
Camera: Medium side shot, switching to front close-up during the strike
